title: viola lucorum
intro: Viola lucorum, also known as the bear's foot or yellow archangel, is a flowering plant species in the genus Viola. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Viola lucorum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
